name: Sinsera Flipper Companion (defensive recon)
description: DietPi image that turns a Pi into a defensive companion for a Flipper Zero. The Pi exposes read-only commands over SSH (device info, BLE scan, sub-GHz spectrum read, NFC inventory) that the Ark Hub dispatches via the SSH Runner. Requires an actual Flipper Zero plugged into the Pi's USB port. Authorization: USE ONLY ON HARDWARE YOU OWN AND NETWORKS / RF ENVIRONMENTS YOU HAVE WRITTEN PERMISSION TO MONITOR.

preconfigured.python_runtime: python3 + pyserial — Flipper Zero CLI bridge

first_boot_sequence: DietPi finishes its standard first-boot setup
Automation_Custom_Script.sh runs — apt install python3-pip + pyserial
Creates /opt/flipper/flipper-bridge.py + a udev rule for the Flipper USB device (vid:0483 pid:5740)
Reboot once so the udev rule takes effect
Plug a Flipper Zero into a USB port. SSH in (key-based) and run python3 /opt/flipper/flipper-bridge.py info
Then open Ark → Can't Phish Here → Flipper to drive it from the browser
authorization_notice: Flipper Zero is dual-use radio + NFC + 1-wire hardware. The Ark Hub dispatches only READ-ONLY commands to the Pi companion: device info, BLE passive scan, sub-GHz spectrum read, NFC inventory. Transmit-capable commands (sub-GHz TX, BadUSB, NFC emulation, IR TX) are NEVER called from Ark. Operator-controlled commands run directly on the Flipper via its physical UI.
